CustomField.formula: CASE(Text(leaseworks__Transaction_Type_PL__c) ,'Invoice', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Invoice__c),null, TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Status__c)) ,'Payable', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payable__c),null, TEXT(leaseworks__Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c)) ,'Letter Of Credit', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Letter_Of_Credit__c),null, leaseworks__Status__c) ,'Payment', IF(ISBLANK( leaseworks__Payments_Credits__c ),null, TEXT(leaseworks__Payments_Credits__r.leaseworks__Payment_Status__c)) ,'Offset', IF(ISBLANK( leaseworks__Payments_Credits__c ),null, TEXT(leaseworks__Payments_Credits__r.leaseworks__Payment_Status__c)) ,'Payout', IF(ISBLANK( leaseworks__Payouts__c ), null, TEXT(leaseworks__Payouts__r.leaseworks__Status__c)) ,'LoC DrawDown', IF(ISBLANK( leaseworks__LOC_Drawdown_rec__c ), null,IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__LOC_Drawdown_rec__r.leaseworks__Approved_On__c),null,'Approved')) ,null)
CustomField.label: Status
